This directory contains runtime knowledge base files for portage-ng.

## Files

- `kb.raw` — raw Prolog facts representing the Gentoo portage tree metadata,
  generated by `--sync` from the md5-cache. Compiled into `kb.qlf` on first
  load for faster startup.
- `profile.raw` — raw Prolog facts for profile data (USE flags, masks,
  keywords). Compiled into `profile.qlf` by `--sync` via `profile:cache_save`.

## Generated files (not checked in)

These files are created at runtime and listed in `.gitignore`:

- `kb.qlf` — quick-load compiled form of `kb.raw` (SWI-Prolog QLF format).
  Regenerated automatically when `kb.raw` is newer or missing.
- `profile.qlf` — quick-load compiled form of profile data.
  Regenerated by `--sync` or on fallback from `cached` to `live` mode.
- `resume.pl` — serialized build state for `--resume` support.

## Regeneration

```bash
# Full sync: fetches portage tree, regenerates kb.raw + kb.qlf + profile.qlf
portage-ng --mode standalone --sync

# After sync, subsequent runs load from QLF for fast startup
portage-ng --mode standalone --pretend sys-apps/portage
```

The knowledge base loading strategy is controlled by `config:profile_loading/2`
(see `Source/config.pl`). When set to `cached`, the QLF files are used; when
set to `live`, profile data is read directly from the portage tree.
